Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If the game difficulty is set to Peaceful, then you can choose to retry a battle even if your HP drops to 0.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When selecting "I can't die yet," all your party members will have their HP and SP restored. All status ailments will be lifted, and the battle will resume.[n]{f 1 1}
